class.name: AbilitySystemAbilitySpec
class.brief_description: Runtime instance of an ability system ability.
class.description: [AbilitySystemAbilitySpec] represents a granted ability with instance-specific data like level and active state.

method.name: get_ability
method.description: Returns the ability resource associated with this spec.

method.name: get_is_active
method.description: Returns whether this ability is currently active.

method.name: get_level
method.description: Returns the level of this ability spec.

method.name: init
method.description: Initializes this spec with an ability resource and level.

method.name: set_is_active
method.description: Sets whether this ability is currently active.

method.name: set_level
method.description: Sets the level of this ability spec.
